facts.claim: 11 rules: BMI computation, FOIS 7-level oral intake, care pathway (GRV/vasopressor/transfusion thresholds), diet & SUP enums. Backend/frontend enum pairs replicate verbatim; no divergence.
Critical dead code: RULE-NUTRICAO-004 AMARELO unreachable (`amarelo > 2` but max=2). Hinting: commented-out criterio_11/12 suggest boundary predates removal.
Embedded thresholds: GRV 500 ml/6h (ASPEN/SCCM 2016), noradrenaline >30 ml/h, transfusion Hb<7, SUP VM>72h (ASHP 1999 vs SCCM 2024 conflict).
Systemic issues: BMI unguarded Infinity (altura=0); HGT max/min uncross-validated; Volume_prescrito_* capitalized; GRV unit window implicit.
Status: 10 OK, 1 DISCREPANCY; Verdict: 2 VERIFIED, 3 DISCREPANCY, 6 NOT_APPLICABLE; Type: 5 decision-tree, 1 each formula/scoring/threshold/eligibility, 2 validation.

PT-BR vocab to preserve: FOIS nivel1-7, diet routes (dieta_zero/via_oral/enteral_sne_gtt/parenteral), acceptance (total/parcial/recusado), prophylaxis (dva/tce/avc/queimado/jejum_prolongado/nao_indicado/terapeutico/vm_mais_72h), risk (lpp/broncoaspiracao/alergia_alimentar).

constraints.text: MUST preserve PT-BR clinical vocab verbatim (FOIS, diet routes, acceptance, prophylaxis, risk flags).
MUST assign GRV 500 ml/6h (ASPEN/SCCM 2016). Clarify unit: ml/6h vs last-6h implicit window.
MUST resolve RULE-NUTRICAO-004 dead code: grow criteria, reduce to 2-color, or document why AMARELO unreachable.
MUST guard BMI: altura=0 & peso>0 → "Infinity". Either reject altura=0 or catch in fallback.

load_bearing.what: 10-criterion pathway (diet, SNE, tolerance, diarrhea, vasopressor, GI-bleed, NPT, insulin); GRV 500ml/6h, noradrenaline >30ml/h, Hb<7 & plt<150k
Nutrition alert coloring: AMARELO unreachable, VERMELHO OK, NEUTRO OK
BMI = peso/altura^2, live on field change, 2-decimal string; edge case altura=0
Frontend nutrition assessment: diet routes, acceptance enum, vomit/GRV/HGT ranges, SUP enum (vm_mais_72h)
SUP eligibility enum (8 values including vm_mais_72h)

systemic.desc: RULE-NUTRICAO-003: GRV ml/6h window implicit; vasopressor needs weight context

pt_br_vocab.prophylaxis: dva | tce | avc | queimado | jejum_prolongado | nao_indicado | terapeutico | vm_mais_72h

notes: Lightweight (11 rules); tight backend/frontend enum alignment. One critical dead-code defect (AMARELO). Thresholds carry published anchors but diverge from SCCM 2024 (MV-alone SUP de-emphasis). Feeds 6 v2 domains.
